message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant Browser
participant Cell
participant FormulaCompiler
participant ExcelExpressionCompiler
participant FormulaEvalVisitor
participant FunctionCall
participant Function

User -> Browser : select workbook
User -> Browser : type in formula
User -> Browser : click button

Browser -> Cell : setContent(formula)
activate Cell
Cell -> Cell : storeContent(formula)
Cell -> FormulaCompiler : compile(this, formula)
activate FormulaCompiler
FormulaCompiler -> ExcelExpressionCompiler : compile(cell, formula)
activate ExcelExpressionCompiler
ExcelExpressionCompiler -> FormulaEvalVisitor : visit()
activate FormulaEvalVisitor
FormulaEvalVisitor -> FormulaEvalVisitor : visitFunction_call()
deactivate FormulaEvalVisitor
deactivate ExcelExpressionCompiler
deactivate FormulaCompiler

Cell -> Cell : reevaluate()
Cell -> FunctionCall : evaluate()
activate FunctionCall
FunctionCall -> Function : applyTo()
deactivate FunctionCall

Browser -> Browser : refresh cell
deactivate Cell
@enduml
